caption: A man with a distinctive, tall, grey pointed hairstyle and glasses wears a white long-sleeved shirt with a gold bow tie. He is seated in a studio setting, wearing black over-ear headphones and speaking into a professional microphone. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing racks featuring items like a "LEE" branded garment. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking and slightly shifting his facial expressions and head posture. An on-screen logo appears in the lower left and right corners of the frame, containing a microphone icon and the text "GOSS TALK JOY" and "PODCAST". The scene remains consistent in lighting and composition as the man continues his discussion, with only subtle changes in his mannerisms and lip movements visible across the progression.
